query:
_index=sec_record_failure
| json field=_raw "reason" as reason
| if (reason matches "*Parsers*", "failed_to_parse", reason) as reason
| timeslice 1h
| count by _timeslice, reason
| transpose row _timeslice column reason

sources.folder: Cloud SIEM - Data Parsing & Mapping Monitoring
sources.dashboardName: Cloud SIEM - Record Parsing and Analysis
sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides analysis on Records parsing.
